# /impl

## Purpose
Implement the scoped issue after estimate approval and mode selection.

## When To Use
Delivery phase when the issue should be solved without a TDD-first loop.

## Required Contracts
- `estimate-approval` - Estimate approval artifact exists and is valid (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_estimate_approval.py`)
- `mode-selection-recorded` - Implementation mode selection (impl/tdd/custom) and reason are recorded (`framework/scripts/gates/validate_mode_selection.py`)
